understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+') in each level. Winning required all goal tiles to be occupied simultaneously. The puzzle involved pushing blocks, navigating walls, and switching between pieces within a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece in the chosen direction. Pushing occurs when a pushable block is adjacent in the movement direction. Walls block movement but their precise behavior varies. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at the given pixel coordinate, but it only works if the piece exists at that exact position and is reachable. The semantic grid uses 3 pixels per cell, and positions in object lists and player.position use pixel coordinates. The heuristic movement_blocked flags are not always accurate, so testing actions is necessary. Steps are limited, and the run ends when steps reach zero or a WIN condition is met.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+') in each level. Winning required all goal tiles to be occupied simultaneously. The puzzle involved pushing blocks, navigating walls, and switching between pieces within a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece in the chosen direction. Pushing occurs when a pushable block is adjacent in the movement direction. Walls block movement but their precise behavior varies. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at the given pixel coordinate, but it only works if the piece exists at that exact position and is reachable. The semantic grid uses 3 pixels per cell, and positions in object lists and player.position use pixel coordinates. The heuristic movement_blocked flags are not always accurate, so testing actions is necessary. Steps are limited, and the run ends when steps reach zero or a WIN condition is met.
